name: Athena

Warrior of The Mind- Jorge Rivera-Herrans

1:21–❍—3:28

↻ ⊲ II ⊳ ↺

↳tw/cw; implications of war/invasion, violence, god/mortal relationship.

Summary-

After Odysseus, Athena picked up another warrior of the mind. She didn’t understand fully why she chose this mortal, especially since they seemed.. like a bad fit to be one of her students. She’s a cold and distant goddess, fixating on creating the greatest warrior.

Out of a sad mortal, they worshipped her to begin with, praying to Athena to be strong and wise like she was. Maybe that was why, but now Athena finds this mortal trying to defend themselves from a village raid, in front of a statue of her. Painfully losing, Athena steps in.
creator: B3LPH3G0R
